characters.description: Admiral MustardBackground informationFirst episode"Homeshare Hoedown"Latest episode"Spinned Off" (video)VoiceMarieve HeringtonCharacter informationGenderMale ♂SpeciesParrotRelativesGloria Sato(owner)Quote"SQUAAWK! I'm lonely, I miss home.""SQUAAWK! Gotta buy more ice cream. Can't believe I ate it in one sitting again! SQUAAWK!""Strong and independent.""SQUAAWK! Where's Gloria's diary? Gotta find it! characters.name: Agent Information
characters.description: Agent InformationRabbitWebsiteBackground informationOnly episode"Internetted"VoiceKira BucklandInspirationSakuya fromSword Art OnlineCharacter informationOther namesMiss InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesAnthropomorphic rabbitHair colorWhiteAffiliationsThe Dark WebGoalTo spread misinformationEnemiesTilly GreenAngelaLikesSpreading misinformationDislikesPeople finding out the truth Agent Information(real nameMiss Information) is a one-time character who only appears in "Internetted". She is a user within the internet who takes advantage of unsuspecting internet users to spread misinformation. She takesTillyas one of her victims when she tries to find the truth about Croblins Bars. She is an anthropomorphic rabbit (although most likely human beyond the internet). She is an anthropomorphic rabbit with white fur, light turquoise ears and eyelids, and glowing yellow eyes with salmon red pupils. This is most likely just her avatar within the internet, and if so, it is unknown what she looks like in reality.

characters.name: Amaryllis
characters.description: AmaryllisBackground informationFirst episode"Impopstar"Latest episode"Spinned Off" (non-speaking)VoiceJessica McKennaInspirationLucy fromElfen LiedCharacter informationAge14GenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanSkin colorPale, light grayish apple greenHair colorBrilliant redOccupationBig fan ofZillon BraxGoalTo keep Zillon as her singing partner forever (failed)HomeBig CityAlliesZillon Brax(big fan)Cricket Greenas Zillon (her side)EnemiesCricket Green (his side)LikesZillon BraxFateTaken away byOfficer KeysQuote"Now, now, Zillon...SAVE YOUR PIPES FOR THE DUET!" Amaryllisis a minor character inBig City Greens. She is a huge fan of tween pop starZillon Brax. She shows signs of a stalker and kidnapper and is arrested during the end of "Impopstar". Amaryllis is a short and slender teenage girl with pale skin and long, waist-length glossy red hair that flows down to her body. Due to her long hair, only one eye is visible.
